title: A cherished culinary haven where tradition meets innovation.
paragraphs: Located in the vibrant heart of Tiptur, Kalpataru Grand is a cherished culinary haven where tradition meets innovation. Known for its commitment to quality ingredients, delightful flavors, and exceptional service, Kalpataru invites you to savor a dining experience like no other.

Nestled near KIT Engineering College in Tiptur, Kalpataru Grand is a convenient stop for both locals and visitors exploring the city. The restaurant's interior is elegantly designed to provide a cozy yet refined ambiance, with warm lighting and tasteful décor that makes every meal feel special.

With over 5,300 Google reviews and a 4.1-star rating, Kalpataru Grand has established itself as a must-visit destination for vegetarian food lovers — from crispy dosas and fluffy idlis at breakfast to rich North Indian thalis and refreshing milkshakes throughout the day.

pillars.title: Pure Vegetarian
pillars.description: 100% vegetarian restaurant with vegan options available — from South Indian classics to North Indian thalis and Chinese specialties.

pillars.title: Quality Ingredients
pillars.description: Each dish is thoughtfully crafted with quality ingredients and authentic flavors that bring out the best in every cuisine we serve.

pillars.title: All-Day Dining
pillars.description: From early morning breakfast at 8 AM to dinner closing at 9:45 PM — breakfast, brunch, lunch, and dinner under one roof.
